name: Centurion Sprite Atlas Capture
description: Inert Centurion at origin with a backdrop of one yellow sun and three planet billboards. The ship is non-combat (perception/AI/firing all skip alive=false placeholders), so the planets and sun are pure scenery for atlas review and screenshot work. Sun position is anchored by a single nav point off-axis (the nav-centroid path in main.cpp); planets are billboard sprites at varied distances and sizes for parallax during fly-by-wire orbit.
